channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Texans never trail while handing Cowboys 5th straight loss, 34-10
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Derek Barnett forced the first fumble and returned the second for a touchdown on the definitive defensive play of the game for the Houston Texans. Joe Mixon did his thing, and C.J. Stroud didn’t have to do much to extend the misery of the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-NBA stars Carter, McGrady part of group seeking to buy stake in Buffalo Bills, AP source says
item.description: Former NBA stars Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady are part of a group being considered by the NFL to purchase a non-controlling minority stake in the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow And Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NHL ref leaves game on stretcher after colliding with Avalanche player
item.description: NHL referee Mitch Dunning was removed from a game between the Colorado Avalanche and Philadelphia Flyers after he collided with a player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Large metal piece falls on AT&T Stadium field before Cowboys-Texans game
item.description: A large piece of metal fell onto the AT&T Stadium turf before the Dallas Cowboys and Houston Texans kicked off on "Monday Night Football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Chicago White Sox sign free agent veteran outfielder
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to a deal with veteran outfielder Austin Slater, who will provide roster depth and familiarity with new director of hitting Ryan Fuller.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NHL referee Mitch Dunning communicative, can move extremities following violent collision
item.description: NHL referee Mitch Dunning is fully communicative and can move all his extremities following a violent collision with Colorado defenseman Josh Manson in Monday night’s game at Philadelphia.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: PGA Tour approves reduction to 100 players keeping cards off FedEx Cup list
item.description: The PGA Tour board has approved sweeping changes to eligibility that wipes out 25 cards starting in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans; no injuries reported
item.description: Officials say a piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a game against Houston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lakers to honor former coach Pat Riley with a statue outside their downtown arena
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Lakers will honor former coach Pat Riley with a statue outside their downtown arena.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 4-time MLB All-Star Kris Bryant’s Lamborghini recovered after investigation cracked down on car theft ring
item.description: Colorado Rockies star third baseman Kris Bryant had his Lamborghini Huracan stolen as part of a car theft ring while reportedly trying to ship it to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Another Lakers legend to receive statue outside arena
item.description: One of the winningest coaches in NBA history will forever be enshrined in downtown Los Angeles when the Lakers unveil the newest statue on Star Plaza outside Crypto.com Arena.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Kansas remains No. 1 in AP poll, top 10 shuffled with losses by 3 teams; Wisconsin joins rankings
item.description: Kansas strengthened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25. The rest of the top 10 turned into a jumble of teams swapping places. The Jayhawks picked up five first-place votes in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released on Monday, receiving 49 from a 61-person media panel. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appears to break out Trump's dance move during tournament
item.description: English LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appeared to join the line of professional athletes who pulled off President-elect Donald Trump's dance move over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CFL Grey Cup ref makes rookie mistake at coin toss
item.description: Canadian Football League referee Ben Major suffered a faux pas during the coin toss of the Grey Cup on Sunday between the Toronto Argonauts and the Winnipeg Blue Bombers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed Buffalo stadium by screaming at the top of his lungs.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cavaliers to put perfect start on line against champion Celtics in juicy matchup, playoff rematch
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cavaliers will put their perfect start on the line in the perfect place. “Boston Garden,” said Cleveland first-year coach Kenny Atkinson, who has yet to lose in his new job. “What's better than that?” As NBA games in November go, not much.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays will have to weather the storm next season at Steinbrenner Field
item.description: As the Tampa Bay Rays begin to gather information for their 2025 season at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, the most unpredictable and challenging element will most likely be weather.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers and other NFL players celebrate TDs with Trump-inspired dance moves
item.description: The Trump dance is becoming a trend around the NFL. Raiders tight end Brock Bowers, Titans wide receiver Calvin Ridley and Lions defensive end Za’Darius Smith followed Nick Bosa’s lead and celebrated big plays on Sunday with dance moves inspired by President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Morgan, San Juan, Beaver win state football titles
item.description: CEDAR CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of unbeatens, Morgan High proved to be the last team standing in the 3A high school football playoffs. The Trojans beat Richfield in a defensive battle Saturday night at Southern Utah University, 13-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: CMU drops final game at home against Western Colorado
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, Colorado Mesa University was dealt a setback by South Dakota Mines. Now, the Mavericks return to their home field with the stakes as high as the Rocky Mountains, aiming to secure a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bulls look to break Rockets' 4-game win streak Sunday
item.description: Houston Rockets (9-4, third in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (5-8, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 7 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Houston is looking to prolong its four-game win streak with a victory against Chicago. The Bulls are 1-4 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: VIDEO: Mike Tyson slapped Jake Paul at their final weigh-in. Here's why Tyson claims he did it
item.description: A meeting between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul briefly devolved into chaos on Thursday after Tyson slapped Paul across the face during the final weigh-in before their highly anticipated fight on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Lone Peak holds off Skyridge in 6A semifinal, 28-21
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Lone Peak Knights avenged a loss earlier in the season to Skyridge, and are headed back to the 6A championship game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Corner Canyon beats Lehi in OT to advance to 6A title game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Corner Canyon is headed back to the 6A championship game, after a 35-34 overtime thriller over Lehi Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs TE Cade Otton emerging as reliable target for Baker Mayfield in absence of injured receivers
item.description: Cade Otton is showing the rest of the NFL the type of offensive weapon the Tampa Bay Buccaneers always felt he could become.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears place Jaquan Brisker on injured reserve
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears placed safety Jaquan Brisker on injured reserve Thursday, team officials announced.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
